    Node importer for AsyncAPI 3.x documents.

    Determines if a Node being dereferenced should be inlined or imported.

    Simple visitor used to mark internal references as "resolved".

    Visitor to determine if a Node is a "Components" node.

    SetContextVisitor

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AaChannelMessagesOnlyIn3xRule
    Rule: CHAN-008 Validates that the 'messages' property only exists in AsyncAPI 3.x channels.
    class 
    AaChannelOperationsIn2xOnlyRule
    Rule: CHAN-009 Validates that subscribe/publish operations only exist in AsyncAPI 2.x channels.
    class 
    AaInfoExternalDocsOnlyIn3xRule
    Rule: INF-006 Validates that the 'externalDocs' property in Info only appears in AsyncAPI 3.x documents.
    class 
    AaInfoTagsOnlyIn3xRule
    Rule: INF-005 Validates that the 'tags' property in Info only appears in AsyncAPI 3.x documents.
    class 
    AaInvalidCorrelationIdLocationFormatRule
    Rule: AACID-002 Validates that correlation ID location is a valid runtime expression.
    class 
    AaInvalidOperationActionValueRule
    Rule: AAO-004 Validates that AsyncAPI 3.x Operation action is either "send" or "receive".
    class 
    AaInvalidParameterLocationValueRule
    Implements the Invalid Parameter Location Value rule for AsyncAPI 3.x.
    class 
    AaMessageMessageIdIn24To26Rule
    Rule: AAM-014 Validates that messages only use messageId in AsyncAPI 2.4-2.6.
    class 
    AaMessageNoMessageIdIn3xRule
    Rule: AAM-013 Validates that messages do not use messageId in AsyncAPI 3.x.
    class 
    AaMessageTraitMessageIdIn24To26Rule
    Rule: AAMTRT-002 Validates that message traits only use messageId in AsyncAPI 2.4-2.6.
    class 
    AaMessageTraitNoMessageIdIn3xRule
    Rule: AAMTRT-004 Validates that message traits do not use messageId in AsyncAPI 3.x.
    class 
    AaOAuthFlowScopesVsAvailableScopesRule
    Rule: AAFLOW-001 Validates that OAuth flows use the correct property name for scopes based on AsyncAPI version.
    class 
    AaOperationMessageVsMessagesRule
    Validates that operations use the correct message property for their version.
    class 
    AaOperationReferenceableOnlyIn3xRule
    Validates that the operation $ref property is only used in AsyncAPI 3.x.
    class 
    AaOperationReplyOnlyIn3xRule
    Validates that the operation reply property is only used in AsyncAPI 3.x.
    class 
    AaOperationSecurityPropertyOnlyIn24PlusRule
    Validates that the operation security property is only used in AsyncAPI 2.4+.
    class 
    AaOperationsOnlyIn3xRule
    Rule: AAD-007 Validates that the 'operations' property only appears in AsyncAPI 3.x documents.
    class 
    AaOperationTraitOperationIdIn2xOnlyRule
    Validates that operation traits in AsyncAPI 3.x do not have the operationId property.
    class 
    AaOperationTraitSecurityIn24PlusRule
    Validates that the operation trait security property is only used in AsyncAPI 2.4+.
    class 
    AaParameterDefaultNotInEnumRule
    Implements the Parameter Default Not in Enum rule for AsyncAPI 3.x.
    class 
    AaParameterStructureChangedIn3xRule
    Implements the Parameter Structure Changed in 3.x rule for AsyncAPI.
    class 
    AaSecuritySchemeScopesOnlyIn3xRule
    Rule: AASS-002 Validates that the 'scopes' property is only used in security schemes in AsyncAPI 3.x.
    class 
    AaServerReferenceableOnlyIn23PlusRule
    Rule: SRV-009 Validates that servers can only use $ref starting in AsyncAPI 2.3.
    class 
    AaServersPropertyOnlyIn22PlusRule
    Rule: CHAN-006 Validates that the 'servers' property in channels only exists starting in AsyncAPI 2.2.
    class 
    AaServerStructureChangedIn3xRule
    Rule: SRV-012 Validates that AsyncAPI 3.x servers use the new structure.
    class 
    AaServerTagsOnlyIn25PlusRule
    Rule: SRV-010 Validates that servers can only have tags starting in AsyncAPI 2.5.

    Implements the SVAR-004 rule: Server Variable Default Not in Enum.
    class
